items.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
items.summary: Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
items.summary: The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings
items.summary: The continued recognition reflects governance systems that are firmly established across its hospitals, with patient safety and care standards applied consistently across specialties and services. The post IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals
items.summary: A public health medicine specialist (PHMS) wants a study to identify MOH's admin posts held by PTDs that can be gradually filled by PHMS or allied health professionals trained in health system management. PTDs are still relevant in some areas in HQ/state. The post Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: SMC Ranked Malaysia’s No. 1 Hospital In Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026
items.summary: Sunway Medical Centre is home to more than 300 resident medical consultants and provides comprehensive care across over 80 medical specialties and 28 Centres of Excellence. The post SMC Ranked Malaysia’s No. 1 Hospital In Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif
items.summary: Nursing is more than bedside care; it is scientific, research-driven, and adaptive. Space nursing demonstrates how far nurses can extend their expertise, reaching environments once thought unreachable. The post Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing
items.summary: Bariatric surgery is often dismissed as “cosmetic”, but it is a medical intervention for severe obesity and metabolic disease. It drives significant weight loss, reduces metabolic comorbidities like diabetes and hypertension, and improves quality of life. The post When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians
items.summary: The Malaysian Dietitians’ Association says over half of hospital patients – and up to 70% among cancer patients – are at risk of disease-related malnutrition, doubling readmission risk and raising costs by 20-30%. Medical nutrition therapy is not covered by insurance. The post Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Public Sector Short Of Over 13,000 Specialists To Meet 2030 Needs: MOH
items.summary: According to MOH data, Malaysia’s public health care sector needs 22,435 specialist doctors by 2030, compared to 9,040 currently in service – a shortfall of 13,395. At current output, only 4,000 to 5,600 specialists would be produced by 2030, less than half the gap. The post Public Sector Short Of Over 13,000 Specialists To Meet 2030 Needs: MOH appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Beyond Turf: Safeguarding Malaysia’s Clinical Core Before It Thins — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin
items.summary: The current debate should not centre on which scheme expands its domain. It should centre on sustaining the full spectrum of health care delivery. The post Beyond Turf: Safeguarding Malaysia’s Clinical Core Before It Thins — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin appeared first on CodeBlue .
